title: crotalaria oxyphylloides
intro: Crotalaria oxyphylloides is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. It is also known as the 'Yellow Bird's Tongue' due to its yellow flowers and long, slender leaves. Crotalaria oxyphylloides has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's roots and leaves are used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions, which are believed to provide health benefits, including relief from fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
